name: Nairobi Warriors
description: Elite rugby club based in Nairobi, competing in national championships. Known for developing top talent that has gone on to represent Kenya internationally.

milestones.title: Team Kits Purchase
milestones.description: Purchase 25 complete rugby kits and training gear

milestones.title: Training Camp
milestones.description: 3-week intensive training camp with international coaches

name: Mombasa Titans
description: Coastal rugby powerhouse with a strong youth development program. Multiple-time coastal region champions with a passionate fan base.

milestones.title: Equipment & Nutrition
milestones.description: Rugby balls, cones, nutritional supplements for 22 players

name: Kisumu Rhinos
description: Up-and-coming team with incredible talent from western Kenya. Growing rapidly with strong community backing from the Lake Victoria region.

name: Nakuru Eagles
description: Rift Valley rugby club known for their aggressive playing style and physical forward pack. Consistently among the top teams in the national league.

milestones.title: Medical Support
milestones.description: Physiotherapy and injury recovery support for all players

name: Eldoret Storm
description: Championship-winning team with a history of excellence. Home to several Kenya national team players and known for their disciplined training regime.

name: Thika Bulls
description: Community-based rugby initiative supporting underprivileged youth in Thika. A social impact project turning young lives around through sport.

name: Kitale Knights
description: Emerging talent hub in western Kenya with great potential. The youngest team in the league, backed by passionate local community support.

name: Isiolo Strikers
description: Northern region rugby team breaking ground in new territory. Pioneering rugby culture in a traditionally non-rugby area of Kenya.

name: Lamu Leopards
description: Coastal youth rugby program with focus on talent development. Operating on the beautiful Lamu archipelago, bringing sport to island communities.

milestones.title: Training Facility
milestones.description: Renovation of training ground and installation of equipment

name: Marsabit Meteors
description: Remote area rugby initiative promoting sport in underserved regions. Breaking geographical barriers to bring organized rugby to Kenya's most remote corners.
